dashboardDefaults.voxi_session_opening: Hi, welcome to VOX Cinemas. I'm Voxi, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

tools.name: show_movie_selection
tools.description: Display the cinema picker, the next progressive discovery question, or the movie cards filtered by the retained guest criteria.

cinemaId.description: Exact cinema ID returned by the widget when available.

cinemaName.description: Spoken or displayed VOX Cinemas UAE location name.

date.description: Requested programming date as supplied by the guest.

displayDate.description: Human-readable date wording when no normalized schedule date is available.

scheduleDate.description: Normalized programming date in YYYY-MM-DD form when known.

tools.name: show_showtimes
tools.description: Display current showtimes for one exact movie from the widget's authoritative movie result.

movieId.description: Exact movie ID returned by show_movie_selection when available.

movieTitle.description: Exact displayed movie title selected by the guest.

date.description: Requested programming date as supplied by the guest.

displayDate.description: Human-readable date wording when no normalized schedule date is available.

scheduleDate.description: Normalized programming date in YYYY-MM-DD form when known.

tools.name: show_seat_map
tools.description: Load and display the seat map for one current returned session. Return after the map is ready and never wait for the guest to choose seats.

movieTitle.description: Exact displayed movie title for the selected session.

sessionId.description: Exact session ID returned by show_showtimes when available.

showtime.description: Displayed showtime used only when a unique session ID is not available.

ticketQuantity.description: Optional conversational seat target only. It never creates a quantity stage or determines ticket count, pricing, or checkout.

date.description: Requested programming date as supplied by the guest.

displayDate.description: Human-readable date wording when no normalized schedule date is available.

scheduleDate.description: Normalized programming date in YYYY-MM-DD form when known.

tools.name: select_seats
tools.description: Confirm the exact seat labels selected by the guest and display checkout using seat-derived ticket count and pricing.

seats.description: Exact available seat labels, for example E1 and E2.

tools.name: show_booking_summary
tools.description: Display a known saved or provider-verified booking summary after matching its booking reference.

movieTitle.description: Movie title associated with the known booking.

screen.description: Screen associated with the known booking.

showtime.description: Showtime associated with the known booking.

seats.description: Seat labels associated with the known booking.

ref.description: Exact booking reference used to find the authoritative stored or active record.

total.description: Known booking total. The widget still treats its stored record as authoritative.

tools.name: show_booking_for_cancellation
tools.description: Display current on-device bookings for target selection or continue cancellation for one exact displayed booking reference.

bookingRef.description: Exact displayed booking reference. Omit it only when the widget must show current bookings for target selection.

tools.name: show_offers
tools.description: Show published VOX Cinemas UAE bank-offer guidance using the guest's non-sensitive eligibility details and locally derived booking totals.

bankName.description: Bank name or alias, for example ENBD, Emirates NBD, FAB, ADCB, or HSBC.

cardName.description: Exact card product or tier when known, for example Visa Infinite or TouchPoints Platinum. Never request card numbers or payment credentials.

experience.description: Selected cinema experience, for example STANDARD, IMAX, MAX, 4DX, GOLD, or THEATRE.

detailTopic.description: Specific offer detail requested by the guest.

format.description: Selected 2D or 3D format when relevant to the offer.

seatType.description: Selected non-sensitive seat category, for example REGULAR, PREFERRED, PREMIUM, SAPPHIRE, or BALCONY.

isMember.description: Whether the guest confirms they are logged in as a VOX member.

monthlyTicketsUsed.description: Guest-provided count of offer tickets already used this month when the published limit requires it.

monthlySpend.description: Guest-provided monthly retail spend in AED when the published card rule requires it.

tools.name: handover_to_agent
tools.description: Prepare a safe VOX Customer Care handover for an explicit human request or after two genuine failed clarifications.

reason.description: Approved reason for preparing the handover.

detail.description: Short non-sensitive explanation of the unresolved request. Never include payment or card details.
